description: Executable claim vectors for the JavaScript GRACE mobile-to-COSA-to-meter-to-Action-State composition. These are vertical composition vectors, not cross-language verifier vectors or evidence of a physical grid deployment.

execution.title: executes, measures, emits a valid -02 Signed Statement, and settles once
refuses initiator self-approval under the pinned mobile roster
refuses an inactive or expired action before touching COSA
consumes one execution and one settlement under concurrent duplicate delivery
refuses meter signature substitution and market-rule smuggling
